aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. The absence of schema markup and FAQ content severely limits AI visibility.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC queries and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI and reduce trust.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website footer
Verify and update NAP details across all directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and troubleshooting advice
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts through detailed HowTo guides and customer testimonials

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and FAQ content, making it invisible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models cite and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting will only widen the gap.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven Leads for Your HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified critical gaps in AI optimization that are likely costing you valuable leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business AI-ready and boost your visibility.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
